channel.title: Two Dad Jokes Daily
channel.description: Two fresh dad jokes every day, delivered by an animated dad. For TikTok and Instagram Reels.

item.title: Dad Joke #5: Broom Missed the Meeting?
item.description:
Why was the broom late for the meeting?
He overswept.
Follow for two dad jokes a day!
Video: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/energeticcity/youtube-political-pipeline@main/videos/short_v20260419-2255.mp4
#dadjokes #dadjoke #comedy #shorts #funny

item.title: Dad Joke #4: A Haircut for Sheep?
item.description:
Where do sheep go to get their hair cut?
The baa-baa shop.
Follow for two dad jokes a day!
Video: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/energeticcity/youtube-political-pipeline@main/videos/short_v20260419-2246.mp4
#dadjokes #dadjoke #comedy #shorts #funny

item.title: Dad Joke #3: February's a Soldier?
item.description:
Can February march?
No, but April may.
Follow for two dad jokes a day!
Video: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/energeticcity/youtube-political-pipeline@main/videos/short_v20260419-2215.mp4
#dadjokes #dadjoke #comedy #shorts #funny

item.title: Dad Joke #2: Calendar Heist!
item.description:
Did you hear about the two thieves who stole a calendar?
They each got six months.
Follow for two dad jokes a day!
Video: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/energeticcity/youtube-political-pipeline@main/videos/short_v20260419-2201.mp4
#dadjokes #dadjoke #comedy #shorts #funny
